column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for our area. Stay tuned for further updates on your ABC Action News Station.
Everyone be safe, wherever you are in Florida!
Getting soggy in Zephyrhills but hanging tough ... rain and some wind
So far my parents are doing well in West Bradenton! They're under a flash flood warning but fortunately drainage around them is pretty good!
It’s wild- this is in NRB
Having fun in our shelter
i’m in my bathroom with my 2 dogs right now !
That bad? What area?
we were in the cone for one of the late night tornadoes ones over LWR. Only spent 30 mins in there when it was literally tracking over our ranxh
Just came in from walking my pup….the ground is like walking on sponges! So much rain!
Wind has picked up
1.10” of rain in Land O Lakes all day. Winds picking up more now and so are the stronger bands. Humidity is really high and feels much warmer due to the winds coming from the south.

As far as a tornado shelter in the house goes, which would be a better option?
We live in a concrete block -one story single family home.
1) The master closet is against an outer wall of concrete block.
2) The most inner room with no windows is the utility room, but it is just drywall and opens to house and garage.
TIA
We're new to the area and were told you are the go-to weather guy. Thanks for keeping it real.
Thank you because the play by play was great guidance. We are east of 75 and route 70. We were in the closet!
